title: lissera hispanica
intro: Lissera hispanica, also known as Spanish valerian, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation due to its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The plant is rich in valerenic acid, which is responsible for its therapeutic benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting a good night's sleep, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Lissera hispanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for anxiety and sleep disorders.
